roadmap.title: Fix Firebase real-time sync on native and persist remotely-added trip items

steps.name: Regression tests for both bugs
criteria: getFirebaseDb applies experimentalForceLongPolling only on web
All new tests fail against current code
steps.implementation_notes: Mock Platform.OS and Firebase SDK. Use jest.isolateModules. For trip: verify storage.saveTrip called after addItem.

steps.name: Fix long polling and addItem persistence
criteria: Native Firestore config has no long polling flag
All regression and existing tests pass
steps.implementation_notes: Wrap experimentalForceLongPolling in Platform.OS === 'web' check. Add persistTrip() after notify() in addItem.

validation.reason: Minimal bugfix scope - 2 steps following RED-GREEN pattern
